lines.text: My name is Sebastian. As per Milady's instructions, I have been entrusted with the honor of inviting you to the Fisalia estate for a discussion.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Milady has expressed a desire to clear up some unfortunate misunderstandings that occurred previously.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I will convey your message to Milady.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: One moment, please. I shall inform Milady of your arrival.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
